---
title: "telemetry.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/telemetry.py"
loc: 63
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.22
style_score: 3.61
intel_score: 8.38
overall_score: 5.88
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SubspaceTelemetry, flare.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SubspaceTelemetry and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [requests](file://requests)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [websockets.sync.client](file://websockets.sync.client)

### Exports
- `SubspaceTelemetry`
- `flare`
- `log_trace`
- `broadcast_alert_to_daemon`
